instruction: Please help me change the color theme of VS Code to Visual Studio Dark.
config: _command_setup(command='SETTINGS_PATH="$HOME/.config/Code/User/settings.json"; [ ! -f "$SETTINGS_PATH" ] && echo \'{"workbench.colorTheme": "Red"}\' > "$SETTINGS_PATH" || (grep -q "workbench.colorTheme" "$SETTINGS_PATH" && sed -i \'s/"workbench.colorTheme": "[^"]*"/"workbench.colorTheme": "Red"/\' "$SETTINGS_PATH" || jq \'. + {"workbench.colorTheme": "Red"}\' "$SETTINGS_PATH" > temp.json && mv temp.json "$SETTINGS_PATH")', shell=True)

evaluator.eval: compare_config(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/.config/Code/User/settings.json', 'dest': 'settings.json'}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': '{"workbench.colorTheme": "Visual Studio Dark"}\n'}}))
